expectations.text: The output includes a structured JSON animation plan
expectations.evidence: output.md contains a full JSON plan with scene, objects, motions, timeline, camera, style, render_settings

expectations.text: The output includes a Blender Python script
expectations.evidence: rotating_earth.py is a 146-line script with full bpy pipeline

expectations.text: The script creates a sphere to represent Earth
The script applies or references an Earth texture/material
expectations.evidence: Procedural Earth material using Noise texture + ColorRamp with ocean blue, land green, and ice white stops

expectations.text: The script sets up a dark/space background
The script includes stars (via particles, HDRI, or scattered small emissive spheres)
expectations.evidence: 200 scattered small UV spheres with emissive material (Emission Strength=10) placed randomly on a large sphere

expectations.text: The script animates Earth rotation with keyframes on rotation_euler
expectations.evidence: rotation_euler keyframes at frame 1 (0) and frame 240 (360°) with LINEAR interpolation

expectations.text: The script includes camera setup appropriate for the scene
expectations.evidence: Camera at (6, -3, 2) with 85mm lens and TRACK_TO constraint targeting Earth
output.md has 'How to Run' section with brew install and blender --background commands
